comment: Recall gate query set. Each case asserts MEANING, not length: the named target must win (or co-win) the query, and no forbidden ref may rank above it. 'node:<id>' names a taxonomy node; 'title:<t>' names a card by title (fs-sync ids are content-addressed, titles are the stable handle). The forbid lists encode the _stack.md failure class: a stack or root must never beat the specific system or skill its query names.

cases.q: upload a file to cloud storage
which credential is needed to access user files
